compiled_state.author: Claude

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
COMPLETED. Added recent_session_logs across all three interfaces:
- Core: recent_session_logs_state(tracker, limit=5) in _engine_support/reads.py — includes session_logs (exclude_session_logs defaults False), excludes archived/deleted, sorts by created_at ns desc, limit<=0 -> [].
- Library: rebar.recent_session_logs(limit=5, repo_root=) (+ __all__).
- CLI: rebar session-logs [--output json|llm] [--limit=<n>] (reader profile; --limit validated as positive int) — registered in reads._COMMANDS and _cli._READS_INIT_ONLY; help txt + overview + golden snapshots added.
- MCP: recent_session_logs tool returning list[TicketStateOut] (auto outputSchema).
- Schema: registered session_logs/session_logs.llm -> TICKET_STATE(_LLM); wired into both coverage guards (CLI + MCP).

Code review caught a help/handler mismatch (help advertised --output text but reader profile only allows json|llm) — fixed to json|llm.

Tests: tests/interfaces/queries/test_recent_session_logs.py covers ordering (newest-first), default+custom limit, limit>count, empty store, non-positive limit, and library==CLI==MCP parity. Full offline tier: 2082 passed, 0 failed. ruff clean.

compiled_state.description:
Add a "last N session logs" capability reachable identically from the library,
the CLI, and an MCP tool, ordered by creation time.

## Why

Agents need a fast way to pull up recent session logs without scanning the whole
store. The requirement is "list the last 5 session logs" from all three
interfaces; rebar's shared read impl means one library function auto-flows to CLI
and MCP.

## What

- Implement the core in `src/rebar/_engine_support/reads.py`: filter to
  `ticket_type == "session_log"`, sort by `created_at` (ns) descending, take
  `limit` (default 5).
- Add the library wrapper in `src/rebar/_reads.py` and export it from
  `src/rebar/__init__.py`.
- Add the CLI subcommand `rebar session-logs [--limit N]` (register in
  `src/rebar/_cli/__init__.py` read group).
- Add the MCP tool (e.g. `recent_session_logs`) in `src/rebar/mcp_server.py` with a
  documented `outputSchema` under `src/rebar/schemas/`.

## Scope

The recent-logs read surface only. Depends on the type existing (foundation) and
on visibility rules (performance isolation).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `rebar.recent_session_logs(limit=5)` returns the 5 newest `session_log`
      tickets, newest first.
- [ ] `rebar session-logs` prints the same, honoring `--limit`.
- [ ] The MCP tool returns the same shape, validated against its `outputSchema`.
- [ ] All three outputs validate against one shared schema (contract test).
- [ ] Tests cover ordering, the limit, and the empty-store case.
compiled_state.title: Recent session logs command across library, CLI, and MCP
